summary: Cycle 2 complete. Delivered: (1) 7 METR-compatible diagnostic tasks in notebooks/hongyang-diagnostic-tasks.md, (2) Spec ambiguity experiment run — 6 subagents, results show pre-pass produces MINIMAL vs MODERATE on Spec A (clear positive effect), MINIMAL/MINIMAL on Spec B (audit trail only), MODERATE/MODERATE on Spec C (slight over-conservatism), (3) Task 4 Grep Test prototype in experiments/task4-grep-test/ — working METR scorer with efficiency metric. Novelty confirmed: MIRROR is execution-level, AMBIG-SWE is external dialogue — our approach is internal reflection at spec level.
